title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Big Mom, Unknown person #12, Chiffon as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad! The chocolate's temperature is going to be affected!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And the whipped cream will melt!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I doubt big mom will be happy with boiled fish!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, ol, are you trying to sink this ship?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Oven! Have you forgotten just how important this cake is?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's going on, Pez? Why have you started laughing all of a sudden?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Father! The temple- nature of the water is drop- ping!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got to get out of this hot water as fast as we can!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you didn't fall into the water, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you... are you trying to kill your son-in- law?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Quickly! Move us out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I know not your name, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you happy? I'm going to make sure your mommy and daddy take good care of you, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're born. I'm done with you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Linlin! Let me hold them at least once!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm glad I got to see you, if only once.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I get the feeling someone's after you, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's okay! We'll be out of the hot- hot water soon, son!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm sure you've had rough days,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And never show me your bloody face again! I'll kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: be by your side then, chiffon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm ever so late, but I still want to say...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 49 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
